title: Patient Care Coordinator
description: We're hiring a Patient Care Coordinator at Baxter International. This is an exciting opportunity to join our patient-focused, medical-device, quality-driven team and make a direct impact on our mission. If you have 0-2 years years of experience and are passionate about Medical Products, we'd love to hear from you.
responsibilities: Coordinate patient scheduling and manage medical records systems
Communicate with patients regarding appointments and care instructions
Process insurance authorizations and manage patient billing inquiries
Support clinical teams by managing workflow and administrative tasks
Track patient outcomes and provide reports to quality assurance teams
Resolve patient concerns and escalate issues to appropriate departments
